# tfe_organization_audit_configuration

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization` (String) Name of the organization.

### Optional

- `audit_trails_enabled` (Boolean) Whether Audit Trails is enabled for the organization.
- `hcp_log_streaming_enabled` (Boolean) Whether HCP Audit Log Streaming is enabled for the organization.
- `hcp_organization` (String) The destination HCP Organization for HCP Audit Log Streaming.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Service-generated identifier for the configuration.
